Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled in the professor's class, including their personal details for birthday reminders.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

name.description: The full name of the student.

rollNumber.description: The unique roll number assigned to the student within the institution or class.

department.description: The academic department to which the student belongs.

birthday.description: The student's birth date, used for birthday notifications and calendar display.

photoUrl.description: An optional URL pointing to the student's profile photo.

imageHint.description: A hint for AI image generation based on the student's photo.

/students/{studentId}.description: Collection to store all student documents.
